package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for background_goroutine_started_inside_transaction_scope: Goroutines launched while relying on open transaction state.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule006NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule006NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule006NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario006Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule006NegativeService, input Rule006NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
